page_title: Manned Reusable Multistage Space Shuttle (UN Version)
text:
is an aircraft that appears in Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance.

Features

History

Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance

When returning from Tabgha Base, Gendo Ikari and Kōzō Fuyutsuki are aboard the space shuttle as they observe the remains of the Second Impact in Antarctica.

Development

It was designed by Hideaki Anno for the Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance film. Evangelion: 2.0 You Can (Not) Advance - Complete Records - Setting Material Edition p.96
